children.heading: Agricultural Act of 1949
children.label: 1 Agricultural Act of 1949
children.text: The term “Agricultural Act of 1949” means the Agricultural Act of 1949 ( et seq.), as in effect on the day before .7 U.S.C. 1421October 22, 2004

children.heading: Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1938
children.label: 2 Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1938
children.text: The term “Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1938” means the Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1938 ( et seq.), as in effect on the day before .7 U.S.C. 1281October 22, 2004

children.heading: Considered planted
children.label: 3 Considered planted
children.text: The term “considered planted” means tobacco that was planted, but failed to be produced as a result of a natural disaster, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Contract
children.label: 4 Contract
children.text: The term “contract” means a contract entered into under section 518a or 518b of this title.

children.heading: Contract payment
children.label: 5 Contract payment
children.text: The term “contract payment” means a payment made under section 518a or 518b of this title pursuant to a contract.

children.heading: Producer of quota tobacco
children.label: 6 Producer of quota tobacco
children.text: The term “producer of quota tobacco” means an owner, operator, landlord, tenant, or sharecropper that shared in the risk of producing tobacco on a farm where tobacco was produced or considered planted pursuant to a tobacco farm poundage quota or farm acreage allotment established under part I of subtitle B of title III of the Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1938 ( et seq.).7 U.S.C. 1311

children.heading: Quota tobacco
children.label: 7 Quota tobacco
children.text: The term ‘quota tobacco’ means a kind of tobacco that is subject to a farm marketing quota or farm acreage allotment for the 2004 tobacco marketing year under a marketing quota or allotment program established under part I of subtitle B of title III of the Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1938 ( et seq.).17 U.S.C. 1311So in original.1

children.label: C
children.text: Dark air-cured tobacco, comprising types 35 and 36.

children.label: G
children.text: Cigar-filler and cigar-binder tobacco, comprising types 42, 43, 44, 53, 54, and 55.

children.heading: Tobacco quota holder
children.label: 9 Tobacco quota holder
children.text: The term “tobacco quota holder” means a person that was an owner of a farm, as of , for which a basic tobacco farm marketing quota or farm acreage allotment for quota tobacco was established for the 2004 tobacco marketing year.October 22, 2004

children.heading: Tobacco Trust Fund
children.label: 10 Tobacco Trust Fund
children.text: The term “Tobacco Trust Fund” means the Tobacco Trust Fund established under .section 518e of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 11 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.
